_comment: Career timeline (most recent first). Add `_id` fields for Indonesian; the site falls back to English when an `_id` is missing. Years of experience are computed from CAREER_START_YEAR (utils/experience.ts), not from here. Set resumeUrl to a PDF path in /public to link a CV file.
summary: Full Stack Developer & Software Engineer with {years}+ years of experience building web apps, developer tools, and interactive experiences. Specialized in Vue.js, Nuxt, Laravel, and Node.js — from client platforms to independent products.
summary_id: Full Stack Developer & Software Engineer dengan {years}+ tahun pengalaman membangun aplikasi web, developer tools, dan pengalaman interaktif. Spesialis Vue.js, Nuxt, Laravel, dan Node.js — dari platform klien sampai produk independen.

timeline.description: Web and microservices development for international clients — REST APIs, Vue.js/Nuxt SPAs, and application architecture with Laravel, PHP, and AdonisJs.
timeline.description_id: Pengembangan web dan microservices untuk klien internasional — REST API, SPA Vue.js/Nuxt, dan arsitektur aplikasi dengan Laravel, PHP, dan AdonisJs.

timeline.description: Freelance full-stack web development — building client web apps and REST APIs with Laravel and Vue.js.
timeline.description_id: Pengembangan web full-stack freelance — membangun aplikasi web klien dan REST API dengan Laravel dan Vue.js.

timeline.description: Built a Facebook-integration optimization rule, a packaging module, a user-management system, and a dashboard & statistics module; integrated third-party platforms like GetResponse.
timeline.description_id: Membangun optimization rule untuk integrasi Facebook, modul packaging, sistem manajemen user, serta modul dashboard & statistik; integrasi platform pihak ketiga seperti GetResponse.

timeline.description: Developed a content-management system and a sales system for a media-analytics company.
timeline.description_id: Mengembangkan content-management system dan sistem penjualan untuk perusahaan media analytics.

timeline.description: Built a savings & loan system, a CMS, and an order-management system; designed an award-winning Scoresheets System (Best CS Award 2016) and integrated social-media monitoring with big data.
timeline.description_id: Membangun sistem simpan-pinjam, CMS, dan order-management system; merancang Scoresheets System yang meraih Best CS Award 2016 dan integrasi social-media monitoring dengan big data.

timeline.description: Networking and technical support for Line Telephone and Internet Speedy services — diagnosing and resolving connectivity issues.
timeline.description_id: Jaringan dan dukungan teknis untuk layanan Telepon Rumah dan Internet Speedy — mendiagnosis dan menyelesaikan masalah konektivitas.
